title: Shared runtime adapter: normalize hostile stdin, JSON systemMessage advisories, nickname fix — all seven wrappers GREEN on the cell-1 table
action: Introduce one small shared adapter (hooks/adapter.mjs) used by every wrapper: normalize arbitrary stdin before any property access, keep root discovery inside the fail-open boundary, encode runtime/event output per host (source identity plugin|repo passed explicitly), and log crashes/coverage gaps WITHOUT changing the allow/deny result. Encode Codex PreCompact, SubagentStop and Stop advisories as parseable JSON systemMessage — never decision:block (per D2: advisory must not continue a child or loop a turn). Fix registered-worker nickname matching: chain-nudge currently reads name|agent|worker while the state CLI stores nickname (discovery.md Proved Gaps) — match on nickname, with a harness row proving a worker registered under nickname is found and the generic fallback still works. Exit: every cell-1 RED row now GREEN, identical harness, zero rows deleted or weakened.

truths: all seven wrappers pass the unmodified cell-1 fixture table
advisory events emit JSON systemMessage and never decision:block
a throwing import or log-write failure never flips an allow into a deny or vice versa
unsupported host paths log visibly as coverage gaps, not silently
a worker registered via bee_state worker add --nickname is matched by chain-nudge (dedicated harness row)
coverage-gap logging is asserted by a harness row (crash-log path, one row per gap class)

artifacts.substantive: stdin normalization + host output encoding + fail-open crash logging

key_links: red-baseline.md is the before-characterization for this behavior change
prohibitions: no fixture row deleted or loosened to get to GREEN
no privacy claims for native reads Codex cannot intercept

verify: node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs

trace.outcome: Shared runtime adapter hooks/adapter.mjs shipped and adopted by all seven wrappers: hostile stdin normalized before any property access, root discovery inside the fail-open boundary, PreCompact/SubagentStop/Stop advisories emitted as parseable JSON systemMessage (never decision:block, per D2), crashes and coverage gaps logged visibly without ever changing the allow/deny result. chain-nudge now matches state-CLI nickname registrations (generic fallback kept). write-guard intercepts canonical apply_patch envelopes and routes parsed targets through the existing gate/direct-edit/reservation decisions; unprovable targets log a visible applypatch-unparsed gap and fail open (deny-on-unprovable deferred to codex-parity-4). All 16 red-baseline rows GREEN on the unmodified cell-1 table; 12 harness rows ADDED (nickname matching, one per coverage-gap class, log-failure-never-flips both directions), zero rows deleted or weakened.
deviations: deviation (rule 3, blocking broken import): skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs HOOK_FILENAMES gained "adapter.mjs" — the wrappers now statically import ./adapter.mjs, so the --repo-hooks vendoring route would otherwise copy wrappers whose import crashes every repo-fallback hook in a host repo. One-line list addition, file reserved under otto before the edit, repo onboarding suite green after (test_onboard_bee.mjs PASS failures: 0).
